profile_backed_target.source: ready bead frankenjax-mcqr.30 plus fresh rch baseline
profile_backed_target.root_cause: F64 tensors still store 24-byte Literal enum elements; dense contiguous f64 reference shows the achievable storage-model ceiling.

baseline.command: RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-fj-lax-dense-f64-pass38-baseline-20260603 rch exec -- cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- 'eval/add_64k_f64' --sample-size 30 --warm-up-time 1 --measurement-time 3

lever.description: Specialize same-shape F64 Add to an indexed loop that removes the generic closure and zip iterator from eval_same_shape_f64_map while preserving f64 from_bits, add, and to_bits order.

format.result: pass before unrelated peer dense.rs formatting drift appeared

tests.command: RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-fj-lax-dense-f64-pass38-test-20260603 rch exec -- cargo test -p fj-lax same_shape_f64_add_sub_div_fast_path_bit_identical_to_scalar -- --nocapture

isomorphism.ordering: same row-major index order as eval_same_shape_f64_map
isomorphism.floating_point: per-lane f64 from_bits, IEEE add, to_bits preserved

after.command: RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-fj-lax-dense-f64-pass38-after-20260603 rch exec -- cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- 'eval/add_64k_f64' --sample-size 30 --warm-up-time 1 --measurement-time 3

decision.reason: The indexed Add loop regressed the large F64 row and did not address the storage-model bottleneck.

coordination.bench_reservation: initially conflicted with BlackGlen, later granted to IcyGlacier
coordination.peer_work_seen: uncommitted crates/fj-lax/src/lib.rs and crates/fj-lax/src/dense.rs changes were present after this pass; they were not modified or staged by IcyGlacier
